final:
module BitwiseAND(
    input [15:0] A,
    input [15:0] B,
    input enable,
    output reg [15:0] Y
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (enable) begin
            Y = A & B;
        end else begin
            Y = 16'b0;
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      Y = A | B;
    end
  end

endmodule
